promoCode.title: Redeem Invite Code
promoCode.desc: Enter your invite code to unlock credits or features.
promoCode.invalid: Invite code is invalid, expired, or already used
promoCode.error: Failed to redeem. Please try again.
auth.title: PetClaw AI
auth.subtitle: Sign in to start using your desktop AI assistant
auth.tagline: A cat working 24 hours a day.
auth.errorNetworkCheck: Cannot connect to server, please check your network
auth.errorEmailFailed: Failed to send email, please try again later
auth.errorGoogleFailed: Google sign-in failed, please try again
apiAlert.creditDesc: Your account has insufficient credits. Please recharge to continue.
apiAlert.authDesc: Your login session has expired. Please sign in again.
apiAlert.upgradeDesc: Max mode is available on paid plans. Upgrade to access more powerful AI capabilities.
sop.pairingTip: Authorization is required in the gateway console. Click the button below to proceed.
onboarding.step1Desc: We've pre-installed useful and safe skills for you
onboarding.step2Title: Set Up PetClaw on Your Computer
onboarding.step2Desc: PetClaw needs the following permissions to work properly. Your data is processed locally and we never store any content.
onboarding.permAutoLaunchDesc: Automatically start PetClaw in the background when you log in, so your AI assistant is always ready.
onboarding.permAccessDesc: This lets PetClaw listen for keyboard shortcuts globally, so voice input can be triggered anytime, even when the app is not in focus.
onboarding.permAccessHint: Find PetClaw in the system settings popup and toggle it on
onboarding.permMicTitle: Allow PetClaw to use your Microphone
onboarding.permMicDesc: Used for voice input only. Audio is never recorded or stored.
onboarding.step3Desc: Press the shortcut to start speaking, press again to confirm and send.
onboarding.voiceShortcutDesc: Click the key on the right to customize.
onboarding.voiceTestDesc: Click below or press the shortcut to start speaking. Introduce yourself, and give me a name while you're at it.
onboarding.step4Desc: Hold the shortcut key and tell your pet what to schedule.
onboarding.step4Prompt: Create a meeting for tomorrow at 3 PM
onboarding.step5Desc: Try again — ask your pet to gather info for you.
chat.modeLifeDesc: Great for daily Q&A, light writing.
chat.modeWorkDesc: Great for complex tasks, deep analysis.
chat.emptyState: Send a message to start chatting
chat.errorCreditInsufficient: ⚠ Task paused — insufficient credits. Please recharge to continue.
chat.errorAuthFailed: Session expired or unauthorized. Please log in again.
chat.attachImagesOnly: This file type is not supported right now
chat.attachCountLimit: You can upload up to 20 attachments
chat.attachSingleLimit: Each attachment must be 25MB or smaller
chat.attachTotalLimit: Total attachment size per message must be 80MB or smaller
settings.upgradeDesc: Unlock more model usage and advanced features
settings.autoLaunchDesc: Automatically start PetClaw when you log in to your Mac
settings.aiPersonaPlaceholder: You are a friendly AI assistant...
update.label: Software Update
update.title: Update Available
update.error: Update check failed, please try again later
update.silentDone: v{version} is ready — restart to apply
settings.voiceInputDesc: Press to start and stop voice input.
settings.shortcutError.empty: Choose at least one shortcut key.
settings.shortcutError.modifier_only: Windows shortcuts must include at least one non-modifier key.
settings.shortcutError.unsupported_modif: Windows shortcuts can't use Fn or the Windows key.
settings.microphoneDesc: Select your preferred microphone for PetClaw to capture your voice.
wizard.inviteDesc: Enter your invite code to get started
guide.step1: Click the crab on your desktop to open the chat
guide.step2: Type a message and press Enter to send
guide.step3: PetClaw AI will respond and help you
guide.dragDesc: Move the crab around the screen
overview.title: Overview
overview.subtitle: Your PetClaw Usage Statistics
skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Install skills to expand your AI assistant's capabilities
skills.depNone: No install commands found. Please refer to the skill docs to install dependencies manually.
skills.depRunHint: Run the following commands to install dependencies
skills.imInstallError: Some steps failed. Try Chat Install below for AI-guided help.
skills.imBlockedHint: The dependencies above can't be installed automatically. Use Chat Install to let AI handle it.
skills.imDone: All set! The skill is ready to use.
skills.configReminder: Not configured — click Config to set up
skills.whatIsSkillDesc: Skills inject expert instructions into your AI, making it smarter for specific tasks.
skills.addCustomUrlPlaceholder: GitHub link or direct SKILL.md URL...
skills.addCustomHint: Supports GitHub repo links, file links, or raw SKILL.md URLs
skills.reloadHint: Skill changes take effect in a new conversation
skills.customEmptyDesc: Skills installed directly via OpenClaw will appear here as "Synced". You can also add custom skills from a GitHub URL.
skills.genManualContentPlaceholder:
---
name: my-skill
description: "My skill: does something useful. Use when: ..."
---

## Instructions
...
skills.genChatDesc: Let AI guide you through creating a new skill step by step — it will write the SKILL.md and run a security audit automatically.
skills.genChatExample: I want to create a new skill. Please use the skill-creator skill to guide me, then use skill-auditor to review it before saving.
skills.genStep1: AI uses skill-creator to guide you — defining purpose, triggers and behavior
skills.genStep2: AI writes a complete SKILL.md following OpenClaw format
skills.genStep3: AI runs skill-auditor security review — saves only after passing
skills.weatherDesc: Get real-time weather and forecasts for any city. No API key needed.
skills.summarizeDesc: Summarize web pages, YouTube videos, podcasts and local files
skills.session-logsDesc: Search and analyze past conversation history
skills.nano-pdfDesc: Edit PDF files with natural language instructions
skills.apple-notesDesc: Read and write Apple Notes, quickly capture and find notes
skills.apple-remindersDesc: Manage Apple Reminders, set todos and due dates
skills.things-macDesc: Manage Things 3 tasks, projects and inbox
skills.peekabooDesc: Take screenshots and automate macOS UI interactions
skills.githubDesc: Manage PRs, issues, CI runs and code reviews
skills.notionDesc: Read and write Notion pages and databases
skills.obsidianDesc: Manage Markdown notes in your Obsidian vault
skills.bear-notesDesc: Create, search and manage Bear notes
skills.gogDesc: Send Gmail, manage Calendar, Drive and Contacts
skills.trelloDesc: Manage Trello boards, lists and cards
skills.himalayaDesc: Send and organize emails via IMAP/SMTP
skills.spotify-playerDesc: Search and control Spotify music playback
skills.slackDesc: Send messages and manage reactions in Slack
skills.goplacesDesc: Search nearby places, get details and reviews
skills.tmuxDesc: Control tmux sessions and monitor background processes
skills.xurlDesc: Post, search, manage followers and DMs on X
skills.openai-whisper-apiDesc: Transcribe audio files with Whisper API
skills.geminiDesc: Use Google Gemini for Q&A and content generation
skills.coding-agentDesc: Delegate coding tasks to Claude Code / Codex
skills.self-improving-agentDesc: Learn from every conversation and evolve — the more you use it, the smarter it gets
skills.capability-evolverDesc: Automatically optimize Claude's system prompt and fix repeated mistakes over time
skills.skill-creatorDesc: Design and write new Claude Skills (SKILL.md files) with guided prompts
skills.agent-browserDesc: Control a real browser to navigate sites, fill forms, take screenshots and extract content
skills.task-schedulerDesc: Schedule recurring tasks with natural language — converts plain English to cron jobs
skills.skill-auditorDesc: Auto-scan external skills for security risks before installation, with A–F safety rating
skills.brave-searchDesc: Search the internet in real time via Brave Search API (2,000 free searches/month)
skills.byte-roverDesc: Build a persistent knowledge graph of your codebase and search it by meaning
skills.data-analystDesc: Read CSV/Excel files, run statistical analysis and generate line, bar and scatter charts
skills.wacliDesc: Send messages and share files on WhatsApp from the command line
skills.gmailDesc: Read, search, compose and send Gmail messages via Google OAuth
skills.literature-searchDesc: Search arXiv, PubMed, Semantic Scholar and more — free, no API key needed
skills.content-research-writerDesc: Research topics and write polished blog posts, articles and newsletters
skills.research-paper-writerDesc: Write structured academic papers with real-time literature search via Perplexity
skills.academic-deep-researchDesc: 8-stage systematic literature review with source credibility scoring, powered by Gemini
skills.stock-analysisDesc: Analyze stocks with Yahoo Finance data — price charts, financials and news
skills.xiaohongshuDesc: Create and publish engaging 小红书 content with trending hashtags and optimized titles
skills.nano-bananaDesc: Generate and edit images with Google Gemini image models (Nano Banana 2 / Pro)
skills.veo-video-genDesc: Generate short videos from text prompts or images using Google Veo 3.1 Fast
skills.well-allyDesc: Track symptoms, medications and health metrics — all stored locally and privately
tasks.title: Scheduled Tasks
tasks.subtitle: Let AI run repetitive tasks on schedule
tasks.sampleWeeklyPrompt: Remind me to write the weekly report
tasks.scheduleEveryHint: Run repeatedly at a fixed interval, e.g. every 30 minutes, every hour
tasks.scheduleCronHint: Use a cron expression for precise scheduling, e.g. daily at 9am
tasks.scheduleOnceHint: Run once at a specific time, good for reminders
tasks.sessionIsolatedHint: AI runs in a fresh isolated context, no shared history — best for most scheduled tasks
tasks.sessionMainHint: AI reads your main conversation history, useful when continuity matters
tasks.descriptionPlaceholder: Brief note about what this task does
tasks.cron.timezonePlaceholder: Leave blank for local, e.g. America/New_York
tasks.offlineBanner: Gateway offline — scheduled tasks require OpenClaw to be running.
tasks.autoRefreshHint: Auto-refreshes every 15s — tasks created via chat appear here too
tasks.onceDoneHint: One-time tasks are removed from the list after they run
channels.title: Channels
channels.subtitle: Connect AI to the apps you already use
channels.telegramDesc: Chat via your own Telegram Bot. Get a token from @BotFather in under a minute.
channels.feishuDesc: AI in Feishu groups via WebSocket — no public URL required.
channels.whatsappDesc: The world's most popular messenger. QR scan pairing required.
channels.discordDesc: Bring AI into your Discord server via the Bot API.
channels.slackDesc: Integrate AI into Slack using Socket Mode — no webhook URL needed.
channels.whatsappQrBody: WhatsApp uses QR-based linking via the terminal. Once linked, the gateway handles everything automatically.
status.syncedLLM: AI model config synced to OpenClaw
status.versionMismatch: Detected OpenClaw {ver}, need to reinstall as {required}...
status.configureBrain: Please configure PetClaw Brain in settings
status.quotaExhausted: Quota exhausted, please change invite code or use your own API Key
status.authFailed: API Key invalid, please change invite code or use a new API Key
status.urlError: API URL or model name error
status.networkError: Cannot connect to LLM API, please check network
status.installDoneConnectFailed: OpenClaw installed but Gateway connection failed. Please restart the app.
